attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
'MT_RSTD_INV_REV_PID_TERR_MTH' AS AUDIT_TABLE_NAME, 
COALESCE(RST.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,ACT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT),
COALESCE(RST.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,ACT.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD)     ,
ZEROIFNULL(RST.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT) -ZEROIFNULL( ACT.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT), 
ZEROIFNULL(RST.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT )-ZEROIFNULL(ACT.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT),
ZEROIFNULL(RST.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT )-ZEROIFNULL(ACT.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT  ),
ZEROIFNULL(RST.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT)-ZEROIFNULL(ACT.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ),
ZEROIFNULL(RST.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT)-ZEROIFNULL(ACT.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT ),
ZEROIFNULL(RST.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT)-ZEROIFNULL(ACT.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT ),
ZEROIFNULL(RST.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT)-ZEROIFNULL(ACT.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT ),
ZEROIFNULL(RST.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT )-ZEROIFNULL(ACT.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT  ),
ZEROIFNULL(RST.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT )-ZEROIFNULL(ACT.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ),
ZEROIFNULL(RST.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY)-ZEROIFNULL(ACT.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY), 
ZEROIFNULL(RST.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY )-ZEROIFNULL(ACT.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY ), 
ZEROIFNULL(RST.DV_EXTENDED_QTY)-ZEROIFNULL(ACT.DV_EXTENDED_QTY), 
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATEETIME, 
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
FROM 
(SELECT 
'MT_RSTD_INV_REV_PID_TERR_MTH' AS AUDIT_TABLE_NAME, 
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT , 
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      )) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT) ) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT)) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT      ) ) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT    )  ) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        )) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT    ) ) AS DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT    ) ) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT )) AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT)) AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,    
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ) ) AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT ) ) AS DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,    
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT    )) AS DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT,  
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT  ) )  AS DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT, 
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           ) )  AS DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,  
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY       ) )  AS DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,    
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(DV_EXTENDED_QTY               ) )  AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_INV_REV_MEASURE  MTGR_MTH
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_DIRECT_INDIRECT_ADJ_TYPE ADJ_TYPE
 ON (MTGR_MTH.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = ADJ_TYPE.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD 
 AND MTGR_MTH.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD = ADJ_TYPE.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD
AND MTGR_MTH.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD = ADJ_TYPE.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD
AND ADJ_TYPE.L3_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID NOT IN 
(
'2-TIER DEF. AND PRIOR MNTH REC',
'2-TIER SPECIFIC RESERVE',
'2-TIER SPECIFIC RESERVE - MANUAL',
'CORPORATE AR',
'CORPORATE RESERVE OTHER',
'2TIER CONTRA OFFSET',
'2TIER RMA OFFSET',
'POS ADJUSTMENTS REVENUE OFFSET',
'CORPORATE RESERVE OTHER_COST',
'POS ADJUSTMENTS COST OFFSET',
'2T INVENTORY COST ADJ OFFSET',
'CORPORATE AR_COST'
) )
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR       RFMY  ON (
( RFMY.PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG      = 'Y'  AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE + 1 AND  RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE + 6) 
OR RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG    = 'Y'   
)
AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  = MTGR_MTH.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  
GROUP BY 1,2,3)ACT
FULL OUTER  JOIN 
(
SELECT  'MT_RSTD_INV_REV_PID_TERR_MTH' AS AUDIT_TABLE_NAME, 
MTIGR_MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT     , 
MTIGR_MTH.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(MTIGR_MTH.COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      )) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(MTIGR_MTH.COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT) ) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(MTIGR_MTH.COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT)) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(MTIGR_MTH.COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT      ) ) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(MTIGR_MTH.COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT    )  ) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(MTIGR_MTH.COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        )) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(MTIGR_MTH.COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT    ) ) AS DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(MTIGR_MTH.COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT    ) ) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(MTIGR_MTH.COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT )) AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(MTIGR_MTH.EXTENDED_NET_QTY           ) )  AS DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,  
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(MTIGR_MTH.EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY       ) )  AS DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,    
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(MTIGR_MTH.EXTENDED_QTY               ) )  AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATEETIME, 
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_INV_REV_PID_TERR_MTH  MTIGR_MTH
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR       RFMY  ON (
( RFMY.PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG      = 'Y' 
	 AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE + 1 AND  RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE + 6) 
OR RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG    = 'Y'   
)
AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  = MTIGR_MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT      
GROUP BY 1,2,3
)RST
ON
ACT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=RST.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND ACT.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=RST.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD

SELECT
'MT_RSTD_INV_REV_PID_TERR_MTH'  AS AUDIT_TABLE_NAME , 
'ALL_COLUMNS'  AS AUDIT_COLUMN_NAME, 
CASE WHEN COUNT(*) >= 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
FROM 
(
SELECT
MTH.*, 
THR.AUDIT_COLUMN_NAME
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_AUD_RSTD_REV_THRSHLD_VALUES THR
INNER JOIN
$$STGDB.WI_AUD_RSTD_INV_REV_MEAS_MTH MTH
ON 
MTH.AUDIT_TABLE_NAME = THR.AUDIT_TABLE_NAME
AND 
THR.AUDIT_TABLE_NAME = 'MT_RSTD_INV_REV_PID_TERR_MTH'
WHERE 
(MTH.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT NOT BETWEEN THR.MIN_THRESHOLD_VALUE AND THR.MAX_THRESHOLD_VALUE
OR 
DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT NOT BETWEEN THR.MIN_THRESHOLD_VALUE AND THR.MAX_THRESHOLD_VALUE
OR
DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT NOT BETWEEN THR.MIN_THRESHOLD_VALUE AND THR.MAX_THRESHOLD_VALUE
OR
DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT   NOT BETWEEN THR.MIN_THRESHOLD_VALUE AND THR.MAX_THRESHOLD_VALUE
OR
DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT NOT BETWEEN THR.MIN_THRESHOLD_VALUE AND THR.MAX_THRESHOLD_VALUE
OR 
DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT NOT BETWEEN THR.MIN_THRESHOLD_VALUE AND THR.MAX_THRESHOLD_VALUE
OR
DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT NOT BETWEEN THR.MIN_THRESHOLD_VALUE AND THR.MAX_THRESHOLD_VALUE
OR
DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT  NOT BETWEEN THR.MIN_THRESHOLD_VALUE AND THR.MAX_THRESHOLD_VALUE
OR
DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT NOT BETWEEN THR.MIN_THRESHOLD_VALUE AND THR.MAX_THRESHOLD_VALUE
OR
DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY NOT BETWEEN THR.MIN_THRESHOLD_VALUE AND THR.MAX_THRESHOLD_VALUE
OR
DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY   NOT BETWEEN THR.MIN_THRESHOLD_VALUE AND THR.MAX_THRESHOLD_VALUE
OR
DV_EXTENDED_QTY   NOT BETWEEN THR.MIN_THRESHOLD_VALUE AND THR.MAX_THRESHOLD_VALUE
)
) 
GL_MTH
